originalTitle: Global oil prices settle at 6-week high after topping $95 a barrel, as hopes dim for de-escalation of Iran war
summary: Oil prices settled at six-week highs on Wednesday after the U.S. struck Iran for the 11th night in a row and President Donald Trump warned that the U.S. will bomb Iranian bridges and power plants if Tehran fires on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
content: Oil prices settled at six-week highs on Wednesday after the U.S. struck Iran for the 11th night in a row and President Donald Trump warned that the U.S. will bomb Iranian bridges and power plants if Tehran fires on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
chineseTitle: 由于伊朗战争缓和的希望渺茫，全球油价在突破每桶 95 美元后收于六周高位
chineseSummary: 在美国连续第 11 个晚上袭击伊朗之后，周三油价收于六周高位，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普警告称，如果德黑兰向霍尔木兹海峡的船只开火，美国将轰炸伊朗的桥梁和发电厂。
chineseContent: 在美国连续第 11 个晚上袭击伊朗之后，周三油价收于六周高位，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普警告称，如果德黑兰向霍尔木兹海峡的船只开火，美国将轰炸伊朗的桥梁和发电厂。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
